description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-icon-button` (T1-02). 5/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon-button/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict compliance, no `any`, proper typing for icon name/label props
2. Accessibility — icon-only button MUST have accessible label (aria-label or visually-hidden text), keyboard activation, focus visible, tooltip integration if present, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all sizes, all states (default/disabled/loading), accessible label present, axe scan
4. Storybook — all variants with controls, accessible label demonstrated
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens only, circular/square shape variants, CSS parts exposed
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon-button/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2) and file:line refs. DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-icon-button — T1-02 antagonistic quality review

summary:
## Summary: Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-icon-button` (T1-02)

### Changes Implemented
- Wrote `AUDIT.md` with full antagonistic review across all 7 audit areas
- 2 P0, 9 P1, 11 P2 findings documented with file:line references and fix priority

### Files Modified
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon-button/AUDIT.md` (created, 294 lines)

### Key Findings

**P0 (blocking):**
1. **Form data bug** — `name`/`value` props are forwarded to the inner `<button>` in Shadow DOM, but the custom element never calls `this._internals.setFormValue()`. Name/value pairs are silently lost from submitted form data. The existing test only checks that `submit` fired, not that `FormData` contains the value.
2. **Keyboard tests are structurally invalid** — Tests dispatch a fake `keydown` event then immediately call `btn?.click()`. The keyboard event has zero effect; the `hx-click` event comes from `.click()`. These tests give false confidence that Enter/Space activation works.

**Top P1 findings:**
- Missing `loading` state entirely (spec calls for it)
- Disabled `<a>` link loses semantic role (no `href`, no `role="link"`)
- Hover `filter: brightness()` applies on all variants, but secondary/tertiary/danger/ghost also override bg-color on hover — double-darkening, visual inconsistency vs. primary
- `title` tooltip is inaccessible to keyboard and touch users

### Verification Status
- No code changes made; audit is documentation-only per feature spec
- No Playwright verification required (no functionality to verify)

### Notes for Developer
- P0-1 can be confirmed immediately: add `new FormData(form).get('action')` assertion to the "submits name/value pair" test — it will return `null`, not `'save'`
- P0-2 can be confirmed: delete `btn?.click()` from the keyboard tests — they will time out waiting for `hx-click` that never fires
